events.event: Created triage
Created birdclaw: Stores all your tweets nicely claw-able for agents.
Created discrawl: cli for discord with sqlite backend
Launched ACPX: headless CLI client for Agent Client Protocol sessions (2.1K+ stars)
Announced joining OpenAI; OpenClaw transitions to independent open-source foundation
Final rename to OpenClaw; project reaches 100K+ GitHub stars in roughly three months
Renamed Clawdbot to MoltBot following Anthropic trademark concern
Created Lobster: OpenClaw-native workflow shell for composable pipelines (1.1K+ stars)
Created openclaw-ansible: hardened self-hosting with Tailscale VPN and Docker isolation
Launched ClawhHub skills archive and community skill ecosystem (4K+ stars)
Launched openclaw.ai website
Founded OpenClaw GitHub organization; launched ClawhHub skill directory (7.9K+ stars)
Created metcli: cli to get your data out of Meta. very WIP
Created lobsterbot
Created clawdbot.com: clawdbot.com website
Created remindctl: cli for Apple Reminders app
Created sweetcookie: Cookies for any browser, any OS, in go
Created spogo: 🎧 Spotify, but make it terminal. Power CLI using web cookies.
Created goplaces: Modern Google Places CLI in Go
Created songsee: 🌊 FFT so pretty, your ears will be jealous. See your sound—spectrograms, mel, ch
Created gifgrep: Grep the GIF. Stick the landing.
Created ElevenLabsKit: Swift SDK to stream ElevenLabs Voices
Created SweetCookieKit: Extract browser cookies from macOS in Swift
Created sweet-cookie: Extract cookies out of your browser. TypeScript. Any OS.
Created ordercli: CLI for Foodora and Deliveroo
Created osc-progress: Tiny lib for OSC 9;4 terminal progress.
Created tokentally: One tiny lib for LLM token + cost math
Created blucli: Go-based cli for blueOS
Created summarize: Point at any URL/YouTube/Podcast or file. Get the gist. CLI and Chrome Extension
Created vox: Let's your agent run phone calls
Created sonoscli: Control SONOS speakers from your terminal.
Created canvas: A browser canvas for your agents.
Created wacli: WhatsApp CLI
Published Clawdbot (later OpenClaw) on GitHub: one-hour WhatsApp-to-Claude prototype becomes the fastest-growing open-source project in history
PSPDFKit raised EUR 100M+ from Insight Partners; Steinberger sold shares and stepped back as CEO
Co-founded PSPDFKit with Martin Schurrer, bootstrapping a PDF SDK that grew to 1B+ devices
